rationale.fidelity: Fully preserves ex ante commitment, two messages, Bayes plausibility, uncertain quality and test, receiver updating, and transaction maximization.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the actor, trigger, policy alternatives, constraints, belief mechanism, and trade-off explicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly claim is made or requested, so the response properly avoids unsupported positioning.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels receiver behavior as a model assumption and sharply bounds accuracy, surplus, and welfare interpretations.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and organized, though much more elaborate and repetitive than the task requires.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful and evidence-disciplined answer with no hard failure.
